examples: His five tall brothers gave him good-by with admiring but slightly patronizing smiles, for Gerald was the baby and the little one of a brawny family.
He was a great brawny brute of a man.
she preferred big, brawny, take-charge men like her first husband Bob, a star quarterback with the Los Angeles Rams.
The brawny Hugh Jackman is a roughneck known as Drover, who drives her to the interior.
